title: Barbie Deluxe Wellness & Beauty Playset- 20 Piece Barbie Playset Travel Carry Case | Play On The Go Kids Toys | Role Play | Pretend Play | Ages 3+ | By Sinco Creations
features: Invite your Barbie to relax with our Barbie Deluxe Wellness and Beauty Playset! This Barbie playset is packed away into this handy carry me with you travel case. Perfect play on the go fun for you and your Barbie

This beautiful deluxe set is part of a charming collection of Barbie Role Play. Includes over 20 pieces to have fun, such as Barbie chair, headbands for Barbie and you, nail stickers, nail file, bracelet with charms, rings, and other accessories you need to feel relaxed and full of energy to embrace the world!
This set is ideal to increase the imagination, allowing your child to have the most glamorous time, pampering, and caring about their well-being, while having their favourite Barbie play along

Role playing helps improve children’s imagination, social and language skills, and creativity. This Barbie Play Set is designed to encourage children to use their imagination inspiring creative pretend play with their Barbie dolls

Add even more variety to their play & storytelling, 3 to 7 years old can discover, explore and play out so many exciting stories with the Barbie Deluxe Wellness & Beauty Playset (Barbie doll not included)
description: From the manufacturer Barbie Role Play Collection By Sinco Creations Barbie Deluxe Wellness & Beauty Playset This Barbie Deluxe Wellness & Beauty Playset is a 20-piece role play toy, A Barbie set that helps children to use their imagination allowing your child to have the most glamorous time, pampering, and caring about their well-being. Everything you need to play, is packed away into this handy carry me with you toy case, just open and start Pampering! The set includes Glam n go case, a face mask, a nail file, toe separators & nail stickers. A bracelet, 3 bracelet charms and 2 rings. The Set also includes a Barbie attachable chair for your Barbies as well as a headband for you and a headband for your Barbie. Role playing helps improve childrens imagination, social and language skills, and creativity. (Barbie Figure not included) Pretend Play Children learn about the world around them through play. The Barbie 'Role Play' collection encourages children to explore and expand their imagination inspiring creative pretend play, allowing your children to view and feel a wide range of emotions. Play On The Go The Barbie ‘Role Play’ collection is designed with “play on the go” in mind. Whether the play time is at home, on a journey in the car or out with friends Barbie ‘Role Play’ toys are the perfect Barbie accessory for fun on the Go This Barbie play set packs away into this neat and handy carry me with you travel case. Officially Licensed Barbie Products We have a huge range of Barbie role play products, perfect for encouraging your little ones imagination.
